text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, during training...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Man, I knew something was up.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's about my cleats. They felt weird when I was running earlier.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And look, they're completely worn out. I'll probably have to buy a
whole new pair.
choice_data_list: Goes to show how hard you've been working.
Goes to show how hard you've been working.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah, reel it in a little, will you?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ah, speaking of! You free on our next day off? I want your help
picking out a new pair of cleats for me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Like, there's a ton of different types, right? I always end up buying
the same ones.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But if you're there with me, we might be able to find an even better
fit for me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, that was easy. Well then, guess we're hitting the streets.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I usually get everything I need from the school store, so coming to a
pro shop like this makes me feel like a real athlete.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Though yeesh, there really are all sorts of cleats out there. Oh man,
how am I supposed to pick just one?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
If only we were looking to buy a watermelon. Then we could just ask
the old ladies running the stalls.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Whiiich is where you come in, Trainer. Help me find my perfect pair,
m'kay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We check out all kinds of different cleats, and I explain the pros and
cons of each to Nature.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks for picking them for me. Can't wait to see how they feel
after I break 'em in.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But I gotta say, you've really got your eye on me, don'tcha? You were
talking about everything, from my best running form to my habits
while running.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: That's a pro for you. I guess I was just surprised, is all. In a good way.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, guess we should head back to the academy—ah.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Having noticed something, Nature walks up to a store in front of us.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I've seen this outfit in a magazine before. Wow, seeing it in person is
way different.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Maybe a little too girly for me, though. Hm, but the color is right up
my alley... Hmmm.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ah, my bad! Left you hanging there, Trainer. Saw an outfit I liked, is
all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Nah, I'm all good now. Wasn't planning on buying it, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But man, even though it looked real cute in a magazine, actually
buying it is a whole different story.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Like, the clothes only looked cute because the model wearing them
was cute, y'know?
choice_data_list: I'm sure you'd be just as cute in it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha, nice joke. Forget cute, I'd look like a brute.

text_block_list.name: Store Employee
text_block_list.text: Welcome! Are you interested in trying on this outfit?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh? N-nah, it wouldn't look good on me.

text_block_list.name: Store Employee
text_block_list.text:
That's not true at all, miss. For this outfit, if you tie up your hair a
little higher, it'll look perfect on you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, I see—wait a second! I see what you're doin', employee of the
month!
choice_data_list:
You will definitely be the cutest girl around in
it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whoa! You're on her side, Trainer?! Like I said, I'm... um...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's right! We already bought new cleats today, so I gotta save
my money!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: That's how it is, sorry! Trainer, let's go already!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh. I almost got roped into trying it on.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sure wasn't expecting you to team up the store against me, Trainer.
choice_data_list: I still insist, you're gonna be the cutest in it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're still going on about that?! Flattering me isn't gonna get you
anywhere!
choice_data_list: I know because I'm always watching over you!
I know because I'm always watching over you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You mean during training, right?! Fashion's a whole different beast!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh... Who would've thought shopping for cleats could be this
tiring?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Nature is open to me picking out her cleats, it looks like
picking out cute clothes for her is out of the question.
